reviewer: Codex application UI screenshot visual review

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing still does not match the same-name reference drawing composition, annotation style, and sheet treatment visible in the Drawing Review UI screenshot.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Generated front/top/right/isometric view placement differs from the reference; the main views are shifted and compressed into a different layout.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Generated dimensions do not preserve the reference-intent target set; structured lifecycle evidence still reports missing post-layout targets and final DisplayDim below the reference floor.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Several generated dimensions are clustered or too small around the primary/projected views, making the manufacturing dimensions hard to read at review scale.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The generated lower-right title/table treatment does not match the compact reference sheet treatment.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Reference-style notes and blue technical annotations are missing or not reproduced with the same placement/completeness.

findings: The Drawing Review application UI screenshot was captured from the fresh run_dir PNG for run 3007ca30db30.
The generated drawing remains visually different from the reference layout and cannot be accepted as a manufacturing drawing.
The generated drawing still fails the 12-target reference-intent DisplayDim lifecycle gate, including post-layout live view recovery.
API/reference scores are only supporting evidence and do not override the visual checklist failure.
entries.required_correction: Revise 006 generation so post-layout live DrawingViews bind correctly, all 12 reference-intent DisplayDim targets persist through final validation, and the visible layout/title block/notes match the same-name reference before any dependent drawing is attempted.
